$comment: Single source of truth for host-bridge tool registration (scripts lane, GA v10). registerHostScripts() reads this and registers each tool into ToolRegistry under the `host_` namespace. tier mirrors server/tool-registry.ts; schema validation is generated from bin/host-bridge/schema.mjs (zod -> zod-to-json-schema). Drift guard ENFORCED (v10): bin/host-bridge/drift-check.mjs asserts inventory names == schema.mjs keys == register BUILDERS == bin/host-bridge/tools/*.mjs files, and every entry file exists; run in CI (scripts-ci.yml). version follows the lane roadmap (vN -> N.0.0); 10.0.0 = GA.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run the project test suite on the host and return pass/fail.

tools.name: git_ops
tools.description: Run a read-only git subcommand (status/log/diff/branch) on the host repo.

tools.name: process_port
tools.description: Report which process holds a TCP port on the host.

tools.name: lint_format
tools.description: Run typecheck/lint on the host workspace.

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Create a conventional commit on the host repo (optionally push).

tools.name: build_app
tools.description: Build the application on the host.

tools.name: kill_process
tools.description: Terminate a host process by pid or name (optional signal).

tools.name: log_stream
tools.description: Tail the last N lines of the host bridge log.

tools.name: pkg_install
tools.description: Install a package via a host package manager.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web or fetch a URL from the host.

tools.name: apply_patch
tools.description: Apply a unified diff to the host workspace.

tools.name: shell_check
tools.description: Syntax-check a shell command on the host.

tools.name: logbook
tools.description: Append to or tail the shared seyir defteri (ship's log).

tools.name: self_heal
tools.description: Detect bridge failure and repair it (stale pid, hung 7345 node, restart/kickstart). DRY by default; pass apply=true to execute.

tools.name: seyir_stats
tools.description: Observability dashboard over the seyir event stream: error-rate, p50/p95/p99 latency, per-tool breakdown, SLO burn-rate. Exits non-zero on SLO alert. Host-operator tool (reads host-local ~/.llm-mission-control), not tenant-exposed.
